summary: The user sought advice on cleaning and displaying their Funko Pop collection, action figures, and comic books, as well as information on coin grading and servicing a vintage NES console. The session included detailed methods for cleaning collectibles, tips for organizing and displaying action figures and comic books, and guidance on finding reputable grading services and repair technicians.
facts: The user has a collection of Funko Pops and is looking for tips on cleaning them without damaging the paint.
The user is interested in displaying action figures in a visually appealing way and requested advice on arrangement techniques.
The user is seeking advice on storing their comic book collection to keep them organized and protected.
The user is planning to get their rare coins graded and slabbed to increase their value.
The user is thinking of getting their vintage NES console serviced to ensure it continues to work smoothly.
The user is looking for tips on finding a reputable repair service or technician for their vintage NES console.
